hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".rb"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then bundle exec rubocop -A --stderr "$file" || exit 2; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".rs"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$file"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo fmt --manifest-path "$dir/Cargo.toml" -- "$file" || exit 2; fi; fi

file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(endswith(".rs"))'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then dir=$(dirname "$file"); while [ "$dir" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; do dir=$(dirname "$dir"); done; if [ -f "$dir/Cargo.toml" ]; then case "$dir" in */wasm/*) if rustc --target wasm32-wasip1 --print sysroot >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo clippy --target wasm32-wasip1 --manifest-path "$dir/Cargo.toml" -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2; fi ;; *) cargo clippy --manifest-path "$dir/Cargo.toml" -q -- -D warnings >&2 || exit 2 ;; esac; fi; fi
